mnemonics.title: Hive's Purpose
mnemonics.content: Hive Is for Very Big Examination - Helps analyze Vast datasets using SQL-like queries on Hadoop.

mnemonics.title: Managed vs External Table
mnemonics.content: Manage Everything, eXternal Data Stays. (Dropping a Managed table deletes Everything; dropping an eXternal table keeps the Data in HDFS).

mnemonics.title: Partition Benefit
mnemonics.content: Partitions Prevent Piles of Processing - They allow Hive to skip irrelevant data, preventing it from processing piles of unnecessary files.

mnemonics.title: Schema-on-Read
mnemonics.content: Read the Rulebook Later - You can load the data first and apply the schema (rulebook) later when you read it.
